zh.Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, England: 英國亨廷格多史爾分斯坦頓
zh.lifeSummary: Henry Howland Of Fenstanton於1564年出生在英國亨廷格多史爾分斯坦頓。他於大約1590年與Margaret在英國亨廷格多史爾分斯坦頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1635年5月在他的家鄉享年71歲，埋葬在英國亨廷格多史爾分斯坦頓。

zh-hans.Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, England: 英国亨廷格多史爾分斯坦頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Henry Howland Of Fenstanton于1564年出生在英国亨廷格多史爾分斯坦頓。他于大约1590年与Margaret在英国亨廷格多史爾分斯坦頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1635年5月在他的家乡享年71岁，埋葬在英国亨廷格多史爾分斯坦頓。

nameMeanings.name: Howland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Howland was the name of three Quaker brothers, original settlers in Marshfield, MA. They were from Huntingdonshire, England. The eldest, John Howland (c. 1593–1672) was a passenger on the Mayflower, servant to Gov. John Carver, who died in the first winter at Plymouth Colony.

variants.name: Holland
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, French, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Holland, a province of the Netherlands.

English: habitational name from Downholland or Upholland (Lancashire), Hulland (Derbyshire), the Parts of Holland, one of the three administrative subdivisions of Lincolnshire, any of the four places called Hoyland (southern Yorkshire), and possibly Great and Little Holland (Essex). The placenames all derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + land ‘land’.

English: habitational name either from Hoeland (Farm) in Bury (Sussex), or from Holland's Barn in Albourne (Sussex). The placename in Bury has the same etymology as in 1 above, while the placename in Albourne may derive from Old English hol ‘hole, hollow’ + land ‘land’.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: Henry Howland Of Fenstanton was born in 1564, in Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, England. He married Margaret about 1590, in Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died in May 1635, in his hometown, at the age of 71, and was buried in Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Henry Howland Of Fenstanton est né en 1564, à Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre. Il a épousé Margaret environ 1590, à Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en mai 1635, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Henry Howland Of Fenstanton wurde 1564 in Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, England geboren. Er hat um 1590 in Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, England Margaret geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb im Mai 1635 im Alter von 71 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Henry Howland Of Fenstanton è nato il nel 1564 nel Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, England. Lui sposato Margaret circa 1590, nel Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel maggio 1635, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, England.

ja.Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, England: イギリスハンティングドンシュアイアフエンスタントン
ja.lifeSummary: Henry Howland Of Fenstantonは1564年にイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアフエンスタントンで生まれた。約1590年にイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアフエンスタントンでMargaretと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1635年5月に故郷で71歳で死去し，イギリスハンティングドンシュアイアフエンスタントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Howland Of Fenstanton(은)는 1564년 영국 헌틴그도실르 펜스탠턴에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1590년 영국 헌틴그도실르 펜스탠턴에서 Margaret(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1635년 5월 그의 고향에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 헌틴그도실르 펜스탠턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Henry Howland Of Fenstanton nasceu em 1564, em Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Margaret aproximadamente 1590, em Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em maio de 1635, em sua cidade natal, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Henry Howland Of Fenstanton родился в 1564 г. в местности фенстантон, хантингдоншир, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret около 1590 г. в местности фенстантон, хантингдоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер май 1635 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности фенстантон, хантингдоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Henry Howland Of Fenstanton nació en 1564, en Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Margaret aproximadamente 1590, en Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en mayo de 1635, en su pueblo, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra.
